title: Abort in passes/techmap/abc9.cc:279 following "synth_ice40 -abc2 -abc9"
body:


Run the following commandline:

```
yosys -p "read_ilang bug.il; synth_ice40 -abc2 -abc9"
```

On my machine (running Yosys git 58ab9f60) this produces the following abort:

```
ERROR: Abort in passes/techmap/abc9.cc:279.
```

I've tried various flag combinations, and this only seems to occur when the `-abc2` and `-abc9` flags are combined.
